---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

What would you like to see improved or added?

## Motivation

Why is this important? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How do you envision this working?

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other approaches?

## Additional Context

Any other information that would help understand this request?
